prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0c9aba6e`.
codex_response:
Implemented `0c9aba6e`. The rule is: split the input at the horizontal `7` row, then mark a cell `8` in the `6x4` output iff the corresponding top-panel cell and bottom-panel cell are both `0`.

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0c9aba6e/verifier.py#L4), the generator is in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0c9aba6e/generator.py#L4), and package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0c9aba6e/__init__.py#L1). The generator explicitly samples the four joint per-cell states `(0,0)`, `(2,0)`, `(0,6)`, `(2,6)` in the official count regime, then renders the fixed `6x4 + separator + 6x4` layout. The `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint was used because it matched the official examples; `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was necessary.

Validation passed end-to-end: `conda run -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 0c9aba6e` passed `5/5`, and `conda run -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 0c9aba6e --n-examples 1000` produced the required artifacts. I also sanity-checked generated output via `preview_01.png` plus sampled examples; the results stay in the same fixed-width, moderate-density family as the official task.
